_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Research the latest machine learning and AI tools, techniques, and best practices.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to evaluate and adopt new technologies, frameworks, and tools for data and AI work, assessing maturity, community support, integration requirements, and organizational fit before recommending adoption.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-A-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-T-010 (SP, cosine: 0.550), OP-S-010 (OP, cosine: 0.547).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.3/10 (raw 0.426). Shared vocabulary: [ai, tools]. DCWF-only terms [best, latest, learning, machine, practices, research] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, adopt, adoption, assessing, community, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.874 (P=0.890, R=0.859). P exceeds R by 0.031 — the DCWF element's 12 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 27 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Research the latest machine learning and AI tools, techniques, and best practice" and "Ability to evaluate and adopt new technologies, frameworks, and tools for data a" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.556 > STS 0.426 (gap +0.129). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ai, tools] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.4%. Shared tokens: [ai, tools]. DCWF-only: [best, latest, learning, machine, practices, research]. WIDAI-only: [ability, adopt, adoption, assessing, community, data].

signals.detail: STS 0.426 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.129 suggests some vocabulary-driven inflation in candidate selection.
